subcodes.title: Words to a pilgrim, spoken on 1914-03-05
subcodes.first_line: Be thou occupied in guiding the souls. If you want to educate a person you must strive for many years
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @light and darkness, @Manifestation of God as educator, @The Holy Spirit
